allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\(d.get\('generado_en','NO FIELD'\)\); print\(list\(d['hoy'][0].keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('react-native', d.get\('exports', {}\)\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) exports = d.get\('exports', {}\) auth_export = exports.get\('./auth', {}\) print\(json.dumps\(auth_export, indent=2\)\) ")
